data.title: Webster Financial (NYSE: WBS) to release Q4 earnings Jan. 23. Analysts predict $1.53 EPS and revenue at $731.66M. Stock closes at $66.22.
data.description: Webster Financial Corporation (WBS), listed on NYSE, is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens on Friday, Jan. 23. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $1.53 per share, showing an increase from $1.43 per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for the company's quarterly revenue is $731.66 million, compared to $660.98 million in the previous year. On Dec. 10, Webster decreased its prime lending rate to 6.75%. Closing at $66.22 per share on Thursday, Webster Financial saw a 0.5% rise. For more detailed information, including analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Bitcoin miners prepare for extensive ice storm hitting southern US. In 2022, Texas miners reduced activities during severe winter storm.
data.description: In 2022, Bitcoin miners in Texas reduced their operations during a severe winter storm to alleviate strain on the grid. This action was taken to help manage the power load efficiently. Such instances where miners have powered down to support grid stability have been observed before.

data.title: Small Data AI in China's manufacturing gaining edge, causing debate on U.S.-China AI competition. Experts analyzed at forum in Guangzhou on Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: A recent industrial AI forum in Guangzhou, China, held on Jan. 22, 2026, saw Dayin Technology participating with prominent experts. Discussions revealed a growing gap in artificial intelligence development between the United States and China. This divergence has sparked renewed attention on the global race for AI dominance.

data.title: Bavarian Nordic partners with Eurofarma for chikungunya vaccine distribution in Brazil, eyes expansion across Latin America.
data.description: Bavarian Nordic recently inked a distribution deal with Eurofarma for its chikungunya vaccine in Brazil. The agreement holds promise for wider coverage in the Latin American region. The collaboration reflects Bavarian Nordic's strategic approach to expanding the reach of its vaccine, illustrating the potential of accessing a market of millions in Brazil and beyond. This partnership signifies a significant milestone for both companies, as they strive to address the healthcare needs of the region by providing access to essential vaccines.

data.title: Transgene reinforces Scientific Advisory Board with cancer immunotherapy experts Antoine Italiano and Ignacio Melero.
data.description: Transgene has recently expanded its Scientific Advisory Board by appointing two distinguished experts in the field of cancer immunotherapy. Antoine Italiano and Ignacio Melero join the Board to provide strategic guidance and expertise. Italiano, a leading figure in the field, specializes in cancer research, while Melero brings his extensive experience in immunotherapy. Their additions enhance the board's capabilities in exploring innovative approaches to treatment. This move reflects Transgene's commitment to advancing cancer research and underscores the company's dedication to scientific excellence.

data.title: Ericsson's Q4 2025 shows 12%* growth in Cloud Software and Services segment, with operational improvements boosting margins.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, in Stockholm, a report on strategic achievements was released, indicating a robust commercial performance and effective operational management. The fourth quarter showed organic sales growth across all segments, notably a 12%* increase in Cloud Software and Services. The report also highlighted operational enhancements in previous years that contributed to significant profit margins.

data.title: INJ Price Predicted to Reach $5.80-$6.20 by Feb 2026 with short-term target of $4.80-$5.00 and critical support at $4.
data.description: Price predictions for INJ indicate a short-term target of $4.80 to $5.00 within a week and a medium-term forecast of $5.80 to $6.20 over the next month. The bullish breakout level is identified at $4.80. It is crucial to note that the critical support level stands at $4.
